title: Essaouira, Marrakech-Safi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Essaouira, Marrakech-Safi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Essaouira is a city in Marrakech-Safi with a population of 77,000. A charming coastal city with a UNESCO-listed medina, famous for its strong winds, art galleries, and laid-back vibe.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
